changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Create the unified LLM usage ledger (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Per-workspace monthly LLM budget cap in USD; null = uncapped (#1368)

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: llm_usage_event missing — nothing to backfill into

changeSet.comment: Backfill the LLM usage ledger from agent_job (#1368)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO llm_usage_event (id, workspace_id, job_type, source_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_calls, cost_usd, occurred_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), j.workspace_id, j.job_type, j.id, j.llm_model, COALESCE(j.llm_total_input_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_total_output_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_cache_read_tokens, 0), COALESCE(j.llm_cache_write_tokens, 0), GREATEST(COALESCE(j.llm_total_calls, 1), 1), -- Guarded cast (#1368 migration-correctness fix): llm_cost_usd is a DOUBLE PRECISION -- column, so historical bad data (a divide-by-zero bug upstream producing NaN/Infinity, -- or any value at/above the NUMERIC(12,6) column's 6-integer-digit capacity) would abort -- the whole migration mid-CAST. Store NULL (UNPRICED, per changeset -9 in -- 1784566728230) instead of throwing. -- -- Rounding-boundary fix (#1368 fix wave): the bound below MUST be checked against the -- value ROUNDED to the column's 6-decimal scale, not the raw double. A raw value like -- 999999.9999999 passes "< 1000000" unrounded, but ROUND(...,6) carries it to -- 1000000.000000 — 7 integer digits, which overflows NUMERIC(12,6) and aborts the CAST -- in the ELSE branch below. Rounding once here (and reusing that same rounded value in -- ELSE) makes the bound check and the stored value agree. CASE WHEN j.llm_cost_usd IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN j.llm_cost_usd = 'NaN'::double precision THEN NULL WHEN j.llm_cost_usd = 'Infinity'::double precision THEN NULL WHEN j.llm_cost_usd = '-Infinity'::double precision THEN NULL WHEN ROUND(j.llm_cost_usd::numeric, 6) >= 1000000 OR ROUND(j.llm_cost_usd::numeric, 6) <= -1000000 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(j.llm_cost_usd::numeric, 6) END, COALESCE(j.completed_at, j.created_at) FROM agent_job j WHERE (COALESCE(j.llm_total_calls, 0) > 0 OR j.llm_cost_usd IS NOT NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM llm_usage_event e WHERE e.source_id = j.id);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: llm_usage_event missing — nothing to backfill into

changeSet.comment: Backfill the LLM usage ledger from chat_message.metadata (#1368)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO llm_usage_event (id, workspace_id, job_type, source_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_calls, cost_usd, occurred_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.workspace_id, 'MENTOR_TURN', m.id, NULLIF(COALESCE(m.metadata->>'model', ''), ''), COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'input') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'input' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'input')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'inputTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'inputTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'inputTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'output') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'output' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'output')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'outputTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'outputTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'outputTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheRead')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'cacheReadTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, COALESCE( floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite') < 50 AND m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->'usage'->>'cacheWrite')::numeric END), floor(CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens' ~ '^[0-9]{1,15}(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN (m.metadata->>'cacheWriteTokens')::numeric END), 0 )::bigint, 1, -- Rounding-boundary fix (#1368 fix wave): the regex's `[0-9]{1,6}` integer-part guard -- only bounds the UNROUNDED string — "999999.9999999" (6 integer digits) matches, but -- casting straight to numeric(12,6) rounds it to 1000000.000000 (7 integer digits), -- overflowing the column and aborting the migration. Round into an unconstrained numeric -- first, then bound-check the ROUNDED value before storing it. CASE WHEN length(m.metadata->>'costUsd') < 50 AND m.metadata->>'costUsd' ~ '^-?[0-9]{1,6}(\.[0-9]+)?$' AND ABS(ROUND((m.metadata->>'costUsd')::numeric, 6)) < 1000000 THEN ROUND((m.metadata->>'costUsd')::numeric, 6) END, m.created_at FROM chat_message m JOIN chat_thread t ON t.id = m.thread_id WHERE m.metadata IS NOT NULL AND (m.metadata->>'costUsd' IS NOT NULL OR m.metadata->'usage'->>'input' IS NOT NULL OR m.metadata->>'inputTokens' IS NOT NULL) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM llm_usage_event e WHERE e.source_id = m.id);

changeSet.author: hephaestus

preConditions.onFailMessage: config_audit_event entity_type CHECK already covers WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'ck_config_audit_event_entity_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET%'

changeSet.comment: Admit WORKSPACE_LLM_BUDGET on the config-audit trail (#1368)
